series.curator_notes: Series has two distinct product lines: 1) Main 'Alles X!' book-based episodes (included) - these are the core Hörspiele based on the popular children's books by Nele Moost; 2) TV series episodes (excluded) - these are shorter 3-episode bundles from the animated TV adaptation. Also excluded: movie tie-ins, audiobook readings (Lesungen), and the 25-year anniversary box set. The 'Alles X!' episodes follow the classic picture book stories and are the primary content parents expect.
